positive: A stylized cosmic fauna composition featuring bioluminescent celestial fox spirits among floating nebulas and crystalline flora. The fox should be rendered in a strong, elegant silhouette with flowing lines, adorned with geometric constellations. Composition must be highly centered and symmetrical, designed for screen printing on apparel. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, burnt orange, and crisp white. The style should blend mystical Art Nouveau linework with clean Sci-Fi graphic design. Ensure the lines are crisp, the details are fractal yet readable, and the overall look is clean, suitable for black and white separation or single-color printing.
